message:
chore(gitignore): also ignore per-test insta pending-snap dotfiles

The existing \`*.snap.new\` and \`.insta.pending-snap\` patterns don't catch
insta's per-test hidden pending form, e.g.

  src/obligation/.marking.rs.pending-snap
  src/obligation/.no_aliasing_proof.rs.pending-snap

These are written by insta when a test fails to match its accepted
snapshot or when a new snapshot is recorded; they're then consumed by
\`cargo insta accept|reject\`. Like the other pending-snap forms they
should never end up in git history — only the accepted \`.snap\` files
get committed.

Adds \`**/.*.pending-snap\` so any \`.<name>.rs.pending-snap\` (or deeper)
falls under the same fail-closed rule, and updates the comment to call
out the per-test hidden form so the next agent doesn't re-add a narrower
pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -125,8 +125,10 @@ artifacts/*
 # Insta pending snapshot files (generated when tests fail or a new
 # snapshot is recorded; awaiting `cargo insta accept` review). Never
 # committed — only accepted `.snap` files go into git.
+# Includes the per-test hidden form like `.marking.rs.pending-snap`.
 *.snap.new
 .insta.pending-snap
+**/.*.pending-snap
 
 # Refactor artifact bulk dumps (per-run baselines that are too large
 # and too transient to commit; the small ledger.md / isomorphism.md
